name: Chocolate Cheesecake Pie
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Combine crumbs, sugar, cocoa and melted butter; press firmly on bottom and up side to rim of 9-inch pie plate. In a mixer bowl, beat cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually beat in sweetened condensed milk then melted chocolate chips. Add eggs and vanilla; mix well. Pour into prepared crust. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until center is set. Cool. Chill thoroughly. Garnish as desired. Refrigerate leftovers.
